---
title: "PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 Complex Structure"
---

## Interactive 3D Viewer of the PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 Complex Structure + Membrane

The viewer below shows an [AlphaFold 3](https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/tree/main)
model of the PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 complex and part of the peroxisome membrane as prepared
with [CHARMM-GUI](https://www.charmm-gui.org/). Use your mouse to rotate, zoom, and
explore the structure.

For full controls, [open in Mol\* viewer](https://molstar.org/viewer/?snapshot-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ydinaii/complex_mol/refs/heads/main/mol-star_state.molx&snapshot-url-type=molx){target="_blank"}.

<iframe id="molstar-frame"
  src="https://molstar.org/viewer/?snapshot-url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ydinaii/complex_mol/refs/heads/main/mol-star_state.molx&snapshot-url-type=molx&hide-controls=1"
  width="100%"
  height="600px"
  style="border: none; border-radius: 4px;">
</iframe>

## Interactive 3D Viewer of the Domain-Colored PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 Complex

The viewer below shows the domain-colored PEX1/PEX6/PEX26 complex ([AlphaFold
3](https://github.com/google-deepmind/alphafold3/tree/main) model), with several
navigable scenes: domain/motif-colored cartoons (PEX1 and PEX6
nucleotide-binding domains, Walker A/B motifs, ISS, PEX26), and per-residue
confidence (pLDDT) views.

Use the scene selector at the top of the viewer to
switch between them, and your mouse to rotate, zoom, and explore the structure.

For full controls, [open in Mol\* viewer](https://molstar.org/viewer/?mvs-url=https://ydinaii.github.io/pex26_site/data/pex26_complex.mvsj&mvs-format=mvsj){target="_blank"}.

<iframe id="molstar-frame-pex26"
  src="https://molstar.org/viewer/?mvs-url=https://ydinaii.github.io/pex26_site/data/pex26_complex.mvsj&mvs-format=mvsj&hide-controls=1"
  width="100%"
  height="600px"
  style="border: none; border-radius: 4px;">
</iframe>
